services.name: CustomerManagement
services.purpose: Owns customer identity, personal information, KYC/AML compliance status, and onboarding workflow

endpoints.description: Create a new customer profile
Retrieve customer information and verification status
Update customer personal information
Update KYC verification status
Get current AML and compliance standing

emits.name: customer.created
emits.description: Emitted when a new customer completes initial registration

emits.name: customer.kyc_completed
emits.description: Emitted when customer passes KYC verification

emits.name: customer.status_changed
emits.description: Emitted when compliance or account status changes

services.name: MarketDataProvider
services.purpose: Wraps external market data APIs to provide real-time quotes, historical prices, and corporate actions to the ecosystem

endpoints.description: Get real-time quote for a security
Get historical price data
Get dividend and split information

emits.name: market.quote_updated
emits.description: Emitted when real-time price data changes

emits.name: market.corporate_action
emits.description: Emitted for dividends, splits, and other corporate events

services.name: AccountService
services.purpose: Owns customer brokerage accounts, balances, trading permissions, and account-level settings

endpoints.description: Create a new brokerage account for a customer
Retrieve account details and current balances
Get all accounts for a customer
Update account trading permissions and settings
Record a cash deposit to the account
Process a cash withdrawal from the account
Calculate total account equity including positions

emits.name: account.created
emits.description: Emitted when a new brokerage account is opened

emits.name: account.balance_updated
emits.description: Emitted when cash balance changes due to deposits, withdrawals, or trades

emits.name: account.status_changed
emits.description: Emitted when account restrictions or permissions change

services.name: PortfolioService
services.purpose: Owns physical stock positions per account, cost basis tracking, and realized/unrealized P&L calculations

endpoints.description: Get all stock positions for an account
Get position details for a specific security
Calculate realized and unrealized P&L for the portfolio
Get position history and cost basis details
Record corporate action adjustments (splits, dividends, spin-offs)

emits.name: position.opened
emits.description: Emitted when a new stock position is established

emits.name: position.updated
emits.description: Emitted when position quantity or cost basis changes

emits.name: position.closed
emits.description: Emitted when a position is fully liquidated

emits.name: portfolio.rebalanced
emits.description: Emitted after corporate actions affect the portfolio

services.name: TradingService
services.purpose: Owns trade order lifecycle, execution, and settlement including order types, fills, and integration with execution venues

endpoints.description: Submit a new trade order
Get order status and fill details
Cancel a pending order
Modify quantity or price of a pending order
Get all orders for an account
Get trade execution history
Get detailed execution information for an order

emits.name: order.submitted
emits.description: Emitted when a new order is placed and validated

emits.name: order.filled
emits.description: Emitted when an order executes, either partially or completely

emits.name: order.cancelled
emits.description: Emitted when an order is cancelled by user or system

emits.name: trade.executed
emits.description: Emitted with detailed trade execution including price, quantity, and fees

services.name: MarginService
services.purpose: Owns margin account calculations, buying power, margin calls, interest on borrowed funds, and liquidation triggers

endpoints.description: Calculate available buying power for margin trades
Get current margin requirements and maintenance levels
Pre-trade margin requirement validation
Check current margin call status and deficiency amount
Calculate margin interest owed on borrowed funds
Get collateral values and haircut calculations
Trigger liquidation process for margin calls

emits.name: margin.call_triggered
emits.description: Emitted when account falls below maintenance margin requirements

emits.name: margin.interest_accrued
emits.description: Emitted daily with calculated interest on borrowed funds

emits.name: margin.liquidation_required
emits.description: Emitted when forced selling is required due to margin deficiency

emits.name: margin.buying_power_updated
emits.description: Emitted when available margin buying power changes

services.name: DerivativesTradingService
services.purpose: Owns derivative instrument definitions, options chains, derivative position tracking, Greeks calculations, and exercise/assignment processing

endpoints.description: Get options chain for an underlying security
Submit derivative orders (options, futures, swaps)
Get all derivative positions and Greeks for an account
Exercise an option position
Get expiration schedules and assignment notices
Calculate Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega) for a derivative
Close or roll a futures position

emits.name: derivative.position_opened
emits.description: Emitted when a new derivative position is established

emits.name: derivative.exercised
emits.description: Emitted when an option is exercised, affecting underlying positions

emits.name: derivative.assigned
emits.description: Emitted when an option writer receives assignment notice

emits.name: derivative.expired
emits.description: Emitted when derivative expires worthless or is settled

emits.name: derivative.greeks_updated
emits.description: Emitted when risk metrics change due to market movements

services.name: RiskManagementService
services.purpose: Owns real-time portfolio risk monitoring, pre-trade risk checks, position limits, and regulatory compliance oversight

endpoints.description: Validate a proposed trade against risk limits
Get current risk metrics and exposures for an account
Set or update risk limits and thresholds
Calculate Value at Risk for a portfolio
Run stress testing scenarios against positions
Get regulatory exposure reporting data
Get current risk limit violations and warnings

emits.name: risk.limit_breached
emits.description: Emitted when positions exceed configured risk thresholds

emits.name: risk.circuit_breaker_triggered
emits.description: Emitted when a trade is blocked due to risk controls

emits.name: risk.exposure_warning
emits.description: Emitted when concentration limits are being approached

emits.name: risk.compliance_alert
emits.description: Emitted for regulatory reporting requirements and suspicious activity

services.name: SettlementProvider
services.purpose: Wraps external clearing and settlement networks (DTCC, NSCC) to process trade settlement instructions and status

endpoints.description: Submit settlement instructions to external clearing network
Query settlement status from clearing system
Handle settlement fails and manual interventions
Get settlement activity and status reports

emits.name: settlement.submitted
emits.description: Emitted when settlement instructions are sent to external network

emits.name: settlement.confirmed
emits.description: Emitted when external system confirms successful settlement

emits.name: settlement.failed
emits.description: Emitted when settlement fails in external system

emits.name: settlement.exception
emits.description: Emitted when manual intervention is required for settlement

services.name: ReportingService
services.purpose: Owns account statements, trade confirmations, portfolio analytics, and regulatory compliance reporting

endpoints.description: Generate account statements for specified date ranges
Create trade confirmation reports for executed orders
Generate portfolio performance analytics and benchmarking
Create position and holdings summary reports
Generate margin and buying power utilization reports
Create regulatory compliance and filing reports
Schedule automated report generation and delivery

emits.name: report.generated
emits.description: Emitted when any report is successfully created

emits.name: report.delivered
emits.description: Emitted when report is sent to customer or regulator

emits.name: statement.published
emits.description: Emitted for periodic account statements

emits.name: confirmation.sent
emits.description: Emitted when trade execution confirmations are delivered

services.name: NotificationService
services.purpose: Owns real-time customer notifications, alert management, delivery preferences, and multi-channel communication

endpoints.description: Send immediate notification to a customer
Update notification preferences and delivery channels
Create price or portfolio alert rules
Get active alerts for a customer
Get notification delivery history
Cancel an active alert

emits.name: notification.sent
emits.description: Emitted when a message is successfully delivered to customer

emits.name: alert.triggered
emits.description: Emitted when customer-defined alert conditions are met

emits.name: notification.failed
emits.description: Emitted when message delivery fails

emits.name: preference.updated
emits.description: Emitted when customer changes notification settings

accepts.name: order.filled
accepts.description: Listens for trade confirmations to send to customers

accepts.name: margin.call_triggered
accepts.description: Listens for margin calls to alert customers

accepts.name: risk.limit_breached
accepts.description: Listens for risk breaches to notify customers

services.name: ComplianceService
services.purpose: Owns audit trails, regulatory reporting, trade surveillance, and compliance monitoring across all brokerage activities

endpoints.description: Generate regulatory reports and filings for FINRA, SEC
Query audit trails and transaction history for compliance review
Monitor trade patterns and detect compliance violations
Analyze and report best execution compliance
Generate large trader position reports
File suspicious activity reports (SAR)
Update compliance rule configurations and thresholds
Get current compliance violations and alerts

emits.name: compliance.violation_detected
emits.description: Emitted when compliance rules are breached

emits.name: compliance.report_filed
emits.description: Emitted when regulatory reports are submitted to authorities

emits.name: compliance.audit_required
emits.description: Emitted when manual compliance review is needed

emits.name: compliance.sar_filed
emits.description: Emitted when suspicious activity reports are filed
